content.en:
Thundered!!!

The entire Quasi-Dao Realm was shaking, constantly swallowing the chaotic energy in the chaos, growing wildly.

This was a good thing for countless people, but soon the Dao Ancestors realized that something was wrong.

This is not the rhythm of promotion to the Dao Realm!

"Strange, according to our speculation, the Quasi-Dao Realm will indeed not be promoted to the Dao Realm now, at least it will take billions of years, what is the situation now?"

"It's definitely not promotion to the Dao Realm, we are all familiar with the Dao Realm, the signs of promotion are not like this, and the birth of the Dao Realm will cause the Dao Origin to come and give the name of the Dao Realm, but now there is no such situation!"

"It's not that you're promoted to the Dao Realm, but you're being promoted, but isn't it the Dao Realm above the Dao Realm?"

Many Dao Ancestors wondered, this situation was too strange!

Suddenly.

A Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Forbidden Palace, the Blood Crystal Dao Ancestor, spoke: "This is not a promotion to the Dao Realm, but to the Ancient Realm!"

"The Ancient Realm?"

Many Dao Ancestors were puzzled, they had not heard of any Ancient Realm, although some worlds were named after Ancient Realms, but they were definitely not the Ancient Realms that Blood Crystal Dao Ancestors were talking about.

"What is the Ancient Realm?"

Daoshan's Tianshan Dao Ancestor asked.

At this time, many Dao Ancestors were surprised, as the second mountain master of the first transcendent force Dao Mountain, the Dao Ancestor of the Tianshan Mountains didn't even know the ancient realm?

This is the oldest transcendent power, and the foundation should still be above the Forbidden Palace!

Blood Crystal Dao Ancestor said with a smile: "It is normal for Tianshan Dao Ancestor not to know the ancient realm, our forbidden hall often wanders in the dark forbidden realm, so we have seen more, the so-called ancient realm is similar to the Dao realm, the only difference is that the rules of the ancient realm are not controlled by the rules of the realm. In other words, once the Ancient Realm was formed, the Chaos Dao Origin of our realm would not be able to invade the Ancient Realm. The rules of each Ancient Realm are different, because I don't know what the rules of this Ancient Realm are in front of me. For example, we can enter the Dao Realm, but we can't enter the Ancient Realm, and the Ancient Realm will forcibly suppress us. "

"As for the formation of the Ancient Realm, we have a guess in the Forbidden Palace, that is, to sacrifice countless treasures and forcibly distort a quasi-Dao realm that is about to be promoted into the Ancient Realm. It is rumored that the forces in some realms did not dare to create the Dao Realm, because they could not stop the Dao Ancestors, but if the Ancient Realm was formed, the Dao Ancestors would not be able to enter it. At that time, as long as a large array is arranged to envelop the ancient realm, ordinary Dao ancestors will not be able to break the ancient realm. Therefore, the Ancient Realm is the best location for the headquarters of many forces!"

"Moreover, the Ancient Realm can continue to be promoted, it can be promoted to the Ancient Realm, the Ancient Realm, and the Supreme Realm, and above the Ancient Realm is the Domain Realm. Whether it is the Ancient Realm or the Dao Realm, the final point of its promotion is still the Domain Realm. "

As soon as the Blood Crystal Dao Ancestor said this, many Dao Ancestors understood.

But they didn't understand, how could the good quasi-Dao realm suddenly be promoted to the ancient realm?

"I'm afraid that those remnant forces in the domain realm have sacrificed countless treasures and forcibly promoted this quasi-Dao realm to the ancient realm!" Tianshan Dao Ancestor guessed.

Many Dao Ancestors thought about it and felt that this possibility was very great.

Because the formation of the Dao Realm is not conducive to the forces of the Domain Realm.

It is estimated that many of those domain powerhouses are still asleep, or have not recovered from their injuries.

Moreover, the rules of the Dao Realm are suitable for their realm, and those powerhouses in the Divine Heaven Realm will probably be restricted in the Dao Realm.

But the ancient realm is different, it is not limited by the origin of the Chaos Dao, and it is an independent realm.

In such a world, the powerhouses of the domain realm will not have a disadvantage.

Moreover, the birth of the Ancient Realm, the Dao Ancestors could not enter the Ancient Realm, only the True Ancestors could enter, which gave hope to the powerhouses of the Domain Realm.

As long as they are given time, even if the Ancient Realm is promoted to the Ancient Realm at that time, the Dao Ancestors have descended, and the powerhouses of the Domain Realm have recovered or awakened one by one, they can naturally crush everything.

It is conceivable that once the Ancient Realm is formed, it will definitely become a battlefield for the True Ancestors.

"Gather the True Ancestors and let them enter the Ancient Realm!"

One by one, the Dao Ancestors of the big forces began to send messages to the True Ancestors of their own forces.

For the True Ancestors, this is definitely a great opportunity, and it is the place where their hope to become Dao Ancestors lies.

Even transcendent forces such as the Forbidden Hall and Daoshan have also been dispatched.

I saw that in the chaos, countless True Ancestors shuttled in, gathering outside the Quasi-Dao Realm one by one, silently waiting for the birth of the Ancient Realm.

And in the Quasi-Dao Realm, many incarnations of Dao Ancestors have left one after another, and they no longer stay in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

They didn't want to leave either, but the Ancient Realm Yicheng, although their incarnation could still stay in the Ancient Realm, the price they paid was too great, and their strength was suppressed very much, and any True Ancestor could bully them.

As Dao Ancestor incarnations, they didn't want to be bullied by True Ancestors.

Of course, there are still some Dao Ancestor incarnations staying inside the ruins, absorbing the benefits of the ruins, and they are naturally reluctant to leave.

......

Terran territory.

Ye Tian finished his retreat and was observing the changes in the Quasi-Dao Realm at the moment.

"Is this about to be promoted to the Dao Realm?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Due to the promotion movement, countless strong people of the Terran Race protected the Starry Sky Continent and the worlds to ensure that the weak Terran would not fall into the promotion of the Quasi-Dao Realm.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian received the summons from the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and only then did he understand that the Quasi-Dao Realm forcibly did not promote to the Dao Realm, but to the Ancient Realm.

"Ancient Realm, this is better, if the Dao Ancestors come, even if I am promoted to the True Ancestor, I am afraid that I am far from being the opponent of those powerful Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, the current situation is more favorable to him, but those Dao Ancestors will be unhappy.

It took a long time for the Quasi-Dao Realm to be promoted to the Ancient Realm, a full hundred years, and the entire Quasi-Dao Realm was in a state of promotion.

A hundred years later.

The entire Quasi-Realm has grown many times larger, no, it should be called the Ancient Realm now.

In the dark, all living beings knew the name of this ancient realm.

Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

The Ancient Realm does not need the Chaos Dao Origin to approve the name, but the Ancient Realm also has its own will, and it will naturally form its own Ancient Realm name.

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm was at least a hundred times larger than the previous Quasi-Dao Realm, and the rules of the world were even stronger.

Ye Tian could feel a unique rule of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, which protected the Ancient Realm and blocked the power of the Chaos Dao Origin.

Suddenly.

The power of a rule turned into a huge list, suspended in the void in the underworld, and then this power of rules spread throughout the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, affecting every living being in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Suddenly, everyone understood a special rule -

Records of the Ancient Realm!

Any record that leaves a record in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm and cannot be surpassed by others in a short period of time can be left on the Xuanxu List.

This is not only an honor, but also an opportunity.

Whoever leaves a record and engraves the Xuanxuan List can be blessed by the Ancient Realm, and during the blessing period, both the cultivation speed and the comprehension have reached an unimaginable increase level.

"Ancient Records !!"

Everyone was crazy and began to choose to break through to the True Ancestor realm.

Of course, if you break through to the True Ancestor realm, if you are the first to break through, you will become the first True Ancestor in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, which should hopefully leave a name on the Xuanxu List.

After all, the first is always the first, and no matter how much others break through, it will also be the second and third.

Therefore, this record should be counted as one.

Ye Tian didn't waste any time, and hurried to start breaking through.
